TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Uciha_Sasukay, title = Uciha_Sasukay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uciha_Sasukay} }

S.FORM: u tademaw nu nilulitan sa, Naluto, Uciha Sasukay(Hulam a kamu: Śģáśôļś≥ĘšĹźŚä©,Lipun a kamu: „ĀÜ„Ā°„ĀĮ„āĶ„āĻ„āĪ,Uciha Sasuke ),i sakasapat a nikapacaw nu kitakit a ninja, malamapaluhay a tuluway a ninja aci Naluto Uzumaki aci Haluno Sakula. ngangan nida ngangan nida ci Uciha Sasukay namakay i laylay a ninja sa, u Salutobi Sasukay hananay. ''Uciha'' malacad tu sapihpih nu Lipun. patektek nida ngangan: Uciha Sasukay wayway nu balucu': kabidangan kaydihan a kakanen: kamulaw, hakhak (pacikahan kacu) kabidangan a kakanen: nadu, sicedamay wama: Uciha Fukuyu ina: Uciha Misa kaka: acawa: kahenulan a tademaw: wakal ate wayway tu nu balucu' u Uciha Saskay u nu sakapitu a pan ni Kakasi, wakal nu micidakay nida sa, u cay katabuyu' a dukes tu lumeniay, lumeniay a mata. sidikuc tu sumilaway atu lumeniay a calaped. i nu saayaway a kungku, u kasitangahay a tademaw nu niyazu', misasiyansiyan nida misakakawaw. u kakayidhan a tadamaw nu siduma a tatyana. wayway nada nu kungku sakacacay a pu kauzipan u Po ku kanatal misekingay tunu depan a ninja malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke-ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ weykipayke- ,ISBN 978-4-08-874247-2,2008ŚĻī9śúą9śó• " ,ISBN 978-986-382-631-6,2015ŚĻī2śúą10śó• "ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ"śľęÁĒĽŚíĆŚä®ÁĒĽ
S.PHON: u tad…ômaw nu nir~…ĺur~…ĺitan sa, nar~…ĺuto, u ¶ińßa sasukaj(ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: *****,r~…ĺipun a kamu: ******,u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô ),i sakasapat a nikapa ¶aw nu kitakit a ninja, mar~…ĺamapar~…ĺuńßaj a tur~…ĺuwaj a ninja a ¶i nar~…ĺuto uzumaki a ¶i ńßar~…ĺuno sakur~…ĺa. ŇčaŇčan nida ŇčaŇčan nida ¶i u ¶ińßa sasukaj namakaj i r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ninja sa, u sar~…ĺutobi sasukaj ńßananaj. Ē~ ° Ē~ °u ¶ińßa Ē~ ° Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa ¶ad tu sapińßpińß nu r~…ĺipun. pat…ôkt…ôk nida ŇčaŇčan: u ¶ińßa sasukaj wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °: kabidaŇčan kajdińßan a kakan…ôn: kamur~…ĺaw, ńßakńßak (pa ¶ikańßan ka ¶u) kabidaŇčan a kakan…ôn: nadu, si ¶…ôdamaj wama: u ¶ińßa fukuju ina: u ¶ińßa misa kaka: a ¶awa: kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw: wakar~…ĺ at…ô wajwaj tu nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u u ¶ińßa saskaj u nu sakapitu a pan ni kakasi, wakar~…ĺ nu mi ¶idakaj nida sa, u ¶aj katabuju Ē~ ° a duk…ôs tu r~…ĺum…ôniaj, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a mata. sidiku ¶ tu sumir~…ĺawaj atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ¶ar~…ĺap…ôd. i nu saajawaj a kuŇčku, u kasitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw nu nijazu Ē~ °, misasijansijan nida misakakawaw. u kakajidńßan a tadamaw nu siduma a tatjana. wajwaj nada nu kuŇčku saka ¶a ¶aj a pu kauzipan u po ku kanatar~…ĺ mis…ôkiŇčaj tunu d…ôpan a ninja mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô-**** w…ôkipajk…ô- ,isbn ***-*-**-******-*,********* " ,isbn ***-***-***-***-*,********** "****"*****
S.FORM: u tademaw nu nilulitan sa, Naluto, Uciha Sasukay(Hulam a kamu: Śģáśôļś≥ĘšĹźŚä©,Lipun a kamu: „ĀÜ„Ā°„ĀĮ„āĶ„āĻ„āĪ,Uciha Sasuke ),i sakasapat a nikapacaw nu kitakit a ninja, malamapaluhay a tuluway a ninja aci Naluto Uzumaki aci Haluno Sakula. ngangan nida ngangan nida ci Uciha Sasukay namakay i laylay a ninja sa, u Salutobi Sasukay hananay. ''Uciha'' malacad tu sapihpih nu Lipun. patektek nida ngangan: Uciha Sasukay wayway nu balucu': kabidangan kaydihan a kakanen: kamulaw, hakhak (pacikahan kacu) kabidangan a kakanen: nadu, sicedamay wama: Uciha Fukuyu ina: Uciha Misa kaka: acawa: kahenulan a tademaw: wakal ate wayway tu nu balucu' u Uciha Saskay u nu sakapitu a pan ni Kakasi, wakal nu micidakay nida sa, u cay katabuyu' a dukes tu lumeniay, lumeniay a mata. sidikuc tu sumilaway atu lumeniay a calaped. i nu saayaway a kungku, u kasitangahay a tademaw nu niyazu', misasiyansiyan nida misakakawaw. u kakayidhan a tadamaw nu siduma a tatyana. wayway nada nu kungku sakacacay a pu kauzipan u Po ku kanatal misekingay tunu depan a ninja malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan weykipayke-ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ weykipayke- ,ISBN 978-4-08-874247-2,2008ŚĻī9śúą9śó• " ,ISBN 978-986-382-631-6,2015ŚĻī2śúą10śó• "ÁĀęŚĹĪŚŅćŤÄÖ"śľęÁĒĽŚíĆŚä®ÁĒĽ
S.PHON: u tad…ômaw nu nir~…ĺur~…ĺitan sa, nar~…ĺuto, u ¶ińßa sasukaj(ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: *****,r~…ĺipun a kamu: ******,u ¶ińßa sasuk…ô ),i sakasapat a nikapa ¶aw nu kitakit a ninja, mar~…ĺamapar~…ĺuńßaj a tur~…ĺuwaj a ninja a ¶i nar~…ĺuto uzumaki a ¶i ńßar~…ĺuno sakur~…ĺa. ŇčaŇčan nida ŇčaŇčan nida ¶i u ¶ińßa sasukaj namakaj i r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ninja sa, u sar~…ĺutobi sasukaj ńßananaj. Ē~ ° Ē~ °u ¶ińßa Ē~ ° Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa ¶ad tu sapińßpińß nu r~…ĺipun. pat…ôkt…ôk nida ŇčaŇčan: u ¶ińßa sasukaj wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °: kabidaŇčan kajdińßan a kakan…ôn: kamur~…ĺaw, ńßakńßak (pa ¶ikańßan ka ¶u) kabidaŇčan a kakan…ôn: nadu, si ¶…ôdamaj wama: u ¶ińßa fukuju ina: u ¶ińßa misa kaka: a ¶awa: kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw: wakar~…ĺ at…ô wajwaj tu nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u u ¶ińßa saskaj u nu sakapitu a pan ni kakasi, wakar~…ĺ nu mi ¶idakaj nida sa, u ¶aj katabuju Ē~ ° a duk…ôs tu r~…ĺum…ôniaj, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a mata. sidiku ¶ tu sumir~…ĺawaj atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ¶ar~…ĺap…ôd. i nu saajawaj a kuŇčku, u kasitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw nu nijazu Ē~ °, misasijansijan nida misakakawaw. u kakajidńßan a tadamaw nu siduma a tatjana. wajwaj nada nu kuŇčku saka ¶a ¶aj a pu kauzipan u po ku kanatar~…ĺ mis…ôkiŇčaj tunu d…ôpan a ninja mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan w…ôkipajk…ô-**** w…ôkipajk…ô- ,isbn ***-*-**-******-*,********* " ,isbn ***-***-***-***-*,********** "****"*****
